caption:
Disney is coming to Abu Dhabi! 🏰 🤩 

Disney CEO Bob Iger just dropped the BIG news on Good Morning America – a brand new Disney theme park is coming to Yas Island, Abu Dhabi! 🌴✨ And it’s not just any park… it’s gonna be the MOST technologically advanced Disney park ever built! 🚀✨

🏰 A magical castle rising from the sand.
🌊 Coastal views + next-level rides.
🎢 Pure Disney magic – right here in the UAE.
